content: CT-MUSIQ: No-reference image quality assessment transformer for brain CT. Multi-scale (224x384), 193 tokens, ViT-B/32 backbone, hash positional encoding, two-stage training (freeze encoder 5 epochs, then fine-tune), EMA for validation, mixed precision AMP, MSE+KL loss for scale consistency. LDCTIQAC 2023 dataset: 1000 brain CT TIFF, 700/200/100 split, radiologist Likert 0-4 scores. Brain window: width=80 HU, level=40 HU. Best validation: 2.72 aggregate (PLCC 0.95, SROCC 0.95, KROCC 0.82).

Two-stage training: Stage 1 (epochs 1-5) freezes transformer encoder, trains only heads with LR=3e-4. Stage 2 (epochs 6-100) unfreezes all, uses linear warmup 3 epochs (LR_MIN to 5e-5) then cosine annealing. EMA smoother used for validation. Mixed precision (fp16) for VRAM efficiency. Gradient clipping max_norm=1.0. Early stopping patience=20. Data augmentation: flip, rotate ±5°, crop 85-100%, brightness/contrast jitter, Gaussian noise.

Brain CT windowing: width=80 HU, level=40 HU (different from original challenge's abdominal window 350/40). Multi-scale pyramid: 224x224 (49 patches) + 384x384 (144 patches) = 193 total tokens. Non-overlapping 32x32 patches. Grayscale replicated to 3 RGB channels for ViT-B/32 compatibility. Augmentation: horizontal flip, ±5° rotation, 85-100% crop, ±5% brightness/contrast, Gaussian noise σ∈[0.005,0.02]. Train/val/test splits by index: 700/200/100. Label averaging across radiologists.

Main CT-MUSIQ: 3 full runs completed, each 100 epochs. Best validation aggregate: 2.72 (PLCC 0.9513, SROCC 0.9462, KROCC 0.8205). Ablations: A1 crashed (single-scale bug), A2 2.233, A3 2.249, A4 2.305 (best), A5 2.251, A6 not run. Baseline (AgaldranCombo): Swin-T+ResNet50, val agg 2.80, but unstable. LDCTIQAC 2023 published top: agaldran 2.7427, CT-MUSIQ ~2.72 would rank #2-3. Issue: Latest checkpoint not tested on test set yet.

ViT-B/32 backbone with 12 transformer layers. Hash positional encoding: 3 nn.Embedding tables (scale, row, col) summing to position vector. Global quality head: CLS token → Linear → GELU → Linear. Per-scale heads: Average-pool per-scale tokens → Linear for scale consistency. Loss: MSE (global vs target) + λ_KL * KL (per-scale vs global, converted to soft distributions via Gaussian kernel). Evaluation metrics: PLCC, SROCC, KROCC, Aggregate (sum of absolutes, official leaderboard metric).

Issue 1: A1 ablation crashes - model.py line ~473 uses config.SCALES (always 2) instead of self.num_scales. Fix: use self.num_scales. Issue 2: Duplicate epoch logging - EMA apply/restore causes two validation passes per epoch, duplicate CSV entries. Issue 3: Baseline validation instability - agaldran_combo val loss swings from 0.08 to 346. Issue 4: Latest CT-MUSIQ not tested - best checkpoint (2.72 val agg) exists but test evaluation not run. Issue 5: custom_collate_fn inconsistency - defined in dataset.py but only used in ablation.py.
